text: Created ticket Validate backend portability and prepare PostgreSQL path

Implemented backend-neutral contract verification and PostgreSQL-readiness guidance in `@pi-loom/pi-storage`. Added `storage/memory.ts` as a non-SQLite reference backend, `__tests__/backend-contract.test.ts` to run the same contract suite against both memory and SQLite backends, and updated `packages/pi-storage/README.md` to state that SQLite is the local-machine default while PostgreSQL is the future multi-machine path. Verified with `npx biome check packages/pi-storage`, `npm test -- --run packages/pi-storage/__tests__/contract.test.ts packages/pi-storage/__tests__/catalog.test.ts packages/pi-storage/__tests__/sync.test.ts packages/pi-storage/__tests__/runtime.test.ts packages/pi-storage/__tests__/backend-contract.test.ts`, and `npm run typecheck`.
